verbatim_quote: avoid eval(string)
rationale_quote: eval enables code injection

verbatim_quote: parameterize SQL queries; never concatenate user input
rationale_quote: string concat invites SQLi

verbatim_quote: prefer typed errors over string-matched messages
rationale_quote: string match drifts; typed errors are stable

verbatim_quote: handle Promise rejection explicitly; do not rely on unhandledrejection
rationale_quote: unhandled rejection becomes silent failure

verbatim_quote: use crypto.randomUUID over Math.random for ids
rationale_quote: Math.random is not cryptographically secure

verbatim_quote: lock dependency versions in production
rationale_quote: unpinned deps cause supply-chain drift

verbatim_quote: validate user input at the API boundary
rationale_quote: validation at boundaries prevents downstream surprise

verbatim_quote: set a maximum payload size on every endpoint
rationale_quote: unbounded payload enables DoS

verbatim_quote: log structured json, not plain text
rationale_quote: structured logs are parseable; plain text fights you later

verbatim_quote: include trace ID in every log line
rationale_quote: untraceable logs hide root cause

verbatim_quote: set request timeouts on every outbound call
rationale_quote: no timeout means cascading failure

verbatim_quote: retry only idempotent operations
rationale_quote: retrying mutations causes duplicate writes

verbatim_quote: null-check the result of array.find before use
rationale_quote: find returns undefined; not handling it crashes

verbatim_quote: prefer Array.from over spread for iterators
rationale_quote: spread on iterators consumes them; Array.from is explicit

verbatim_quote: avoid mutating function arguments
rationale_quote: argument mutation creates spooky action at distance

verbatim_quote: use Object.freeze for compile-time-constant configuration
rationale_quote: mutable config is mutated by accident later

verbatim_quote: handle clock drift in time-sensitive comparisons
rationale_quote: clock skew causes intermittent test flakes and prod issues

verbatim_quote: use ISO-8601 strings for all dates in logs and APIs
rationale_quote: epoch ms vs seconds vs locale strings cause integration bugs

verbatim_quote: default to least-privilege when adding a new permission
rationale_quote: granted-by-default permissions accumulate as security debt

verbatim_quote: fail-closed on auth-check exceptions, not fail-open
rationale_quote: fail-open on exception bypasses auth entirely
